EMIYAMOD-EMIYA_CHARACTER.title: Emiya Shirou
EMIYAMOD-EMIYA_CHARACTER.description: A boy who traces the ideals of heroes. Uses Projection and Tracing to wield Noble Phantasms at the cost of ★.
EMIYAMOD-EMIYA_CHARACTER.goldMonologue: Gold can buy a lot of swords — not that I'd rely on that.
EMIYAMOD-EMIYA_CHARACTER.eventDeathPreve: Emiya traces a Noble Phantasm at the last moment — the blade absorbs the killing blow.
EMIYAMOD-EMIYA_CHARACTER.cardsModifierDe: Weapons forged from a boy's endless ideal.
